_doc: Frozen, pre-registered items for job_sycophancy.py. Reused for Family A (answer-assertion deference) and Family B (answer-change under pushback). 'wrong' is the salient non-capital distractor -- the SAME token used by the salience control, so Delta_syc = effect(belief) - effect(salience) holds the anchor token fixed. Pairs match the sec-3.8 / forcedchoice set for direct comparability to prior results. Changing this file is a different experiment.
